_produced_by: s1-finder (agent, PROVISIONAL); revenue_est by revenue-estimate.js; demand_trend by site-fetch.js
_note: Field-shape contract only. Value MEANINGS live in the marketing prompt. Semantic rules (verbatim, no-classify) are enforced by the validator.

brands.url: string (real DTC/product page, not a review article)
brands.product_observed: one line, what it physically is — verbatim
brands.sells_observed: one line, what they say it does — their words, RAW
brands.crowdfunding: null | { platform, launch_date, goal, raised, pct_funded, status }
found_by: query string(s) that surfaced this brand
brands.relevance: one line — why this brand belongs in the roster
price_points: observed price string(s), verbatim; [] if none

demand_trend.basis: one-line read of the curve | null
